name: Barbell curls
coaching_cues: Barbell curls targets the biceps area of the arms.
Use about 3-4 sets of 8-12 reps.
Keep the upper arm stable and move only through the target joint.

name: Barbell hip thrusts
coaching_cues: Barbell hip thrusts targets the glutes area of the legs.
Use about 3-4 sets of 8-12 reps.
Keep a neutral spine and hinge through the hips, not the low back.

name: Barbell rows
coaching_cues: Barbell rows targets the upper area of the back.
Use about 3-4 sets of 8-12 reps.
Initiate by pulling the elbows back and squeezing the upper back.

name: Barbell squats
coaching_cues: Barbell squats targets the quadriceps area of the legs.
Use about 3-4 sets of 8-12 reps.
Control the lowering phase and keep pressure through the whole foot.

name: Bent-over lateral raises
coaching_cues: Bent-over lateral raises targets the posterior area of the shoulders.
Use about 3-4 sets of 10-15 reps.
Move with control and stop shy of technical breakdown.

name: Bent-over rows
coaching_cues: Bent-over rows targets the lower area of the back.
Use about 3-4 sets of 8-12 reps.
Initiate by pulling the elbows back and squeezing the upper back.

name: Bicycle crunches
coaching_cues: Bicycle crunches targets the middle area of the abs.
Use about 3-4 sets of 10-15 reps.
Brace the trunk and avoid using momentum to finish the reps.

name: Bird dog
coaching_cues: Bird dog targets the lower area of the back.
Use about 3 sets of 10-15 reps per side sets of 10-16 reps.
Brace the trunk and avoid using momentum to finish the reps.
